s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Turn the shift lever knob counterclockwise and remove the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Turn the shift lever knob counterclockwise and remove the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 1 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the No. 2 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FLOOR SHIFT POSITION INDICATOR HOUSING SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 6 claws and the 3 clips, and then remove the floor shift position indicator housing sub-assembly.
with Seat Heater System:

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE PANEL (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Open the lid of the upper console panel.
Apply protective tape to the area shown in the illustration.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 claws and the 5 clips, and then remove the upper console panel as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 5 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 5 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.
Remove the 2 screws <F>.
Disengage the 4 claws.
Disconnect each connector and remove the upper console panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT PANEL NO. 2 REGISTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Apply protective tape to the areas shown in the illustration.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 3 clips.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 4 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the instrument panel No. 2 register assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RADIO RECEIVER WITH HEATER CONTROL PANEL ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 bolts.
Pull the radio receiver with heater control panel assembly toward the rear of the vehicle and disengage the 4 clips.
Disconnect each connector and remove the radio receiver with heater control panel assembly.
Remove the 5 bolts and radio No. 1 bracket.
Remove the 5 bolts and radio No. 2 bracket.
Remove the radio receiver assembly as shown in the illustration.
